trigger_email_summary: A fictional insurer repudiates a device claim using a broad exclusion reason and does not clearly explain the policy clause or appeal deadline.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic device incident reported. Redaction warning: never store real device identifiers, incident reports, or claim documents.
Insurer acknowledged the fictional claim and requested supporting documents.
Insurer rejected the claim with a generic exclusion summary.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Submit appeal or request full repudiation basis.

disputed_amounts.note: Demo amount only; not based on real policy data.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Needed to verify coverage and exclusions.

missing_evidence: Assessment notes or claim investigation summary
company_response_gaps: Policy clause not clearly mapped to incident facts
recommended_next_action: Draft an appeal request asking for the full repudiation basis, clause mapping, assessment notes, and confirmation of the appeal deadline.
draft_reply_outline: Request the exact policy clause and factual basis.
Ask for claim assessment notes and missing-document list.
Reserve right to escalate if appeal information is not supplied.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-INS-001: Device claim repudiation
telegram_card_preview.body: High priority. Appeal window likely active. Deadline 2026-07-29. Recommended: request full repudiation basis and appeal deadline confirmation.

redaction_required.warning: Replace real policy numbers, claim references, device IDs, incident reports, names, and exact insurer wording with synthetic summaries.
